examples.title: Change Control Process Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm demonstrating the formal change control process to prevent scope creep
examples.code:
PROCEDURE ChangeControl(changeRequest)
BEGIN
 SUBMIT: Log change request with description
 EVALUATE: Assess impact on scope, schedule, cost
 IF impact > threshold THEN
 REVIEW: Send to Change Control Board
 DECISION: CCB approves/rejects change
 ELSE
 DECISION: Project Manager decides
 ENDIF
 
 IF approved THEN
 UPDATE: Modify project documents
 IMPLEMENT: Execute change
 COMMUNICATE: Notify all stakeholders
 ELSE
 ARCHIVE: Document rejection reason
 ENDIF
 
 RETURN status
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode shows the step-by-step process of managing changes to project scope, ensuring all changes are formally evaluated, approved, and documented before implementation.

examples.title: Risk Assessment Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm for identifying and assessing project risks using probability-impact matrix
examples.code:
PROCEDURE AssessRisks(risksList)
BEGIN
 FOR each risk IN risksList DO
 probability = EstimateProbability(risk)
 impact = EstimateImpact(risk)
 priority = probability * impact
 
 IF priority >= HIGH_THRESHOLD THEN
 category = "CRITICAL"
 response = DevelopResponse(risk)
 ELSE IF priority >= MEDIUM_THRESHOLD THEN
 category = "MODERATE"
 response = MitigateRisk(risk)
 ELSE
 category = "LOW"
 response = MonitorRisk(risk)
 ENDIF
 
 AddToRiskRegister(risk, category, response)
 ENDFOR
 
 RETURN RiskRegister
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm demonstrates how risks are systematically assessed based on probability and impact, then categorized and assigned appropriate response strategies.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n = number of risks

examples.title: Project Success Criteria Check
examples.description: Algorithm to evaluate if project meets success criteria at completion
examples.code:
PROCEDURE EvaluateProjectSuccess(project)
BEGIN
 score = 0
 maxScore = 100
 
 // Iron Triangle Assessment
 IF project.actualCost <= project.budgetedCost THEN
 score = score + 25
 ELSE
 score = score + (project.budgetedCost / project.actualCost) * 25
 ENDIF
 
 IF project.actualTime <= project.plannedTime THEN
 score = score + 25
 ELSE
 score = score + (project.plannedTime / project.actualTime) * 25
 ENDIF
 
 requirementsMet = CalculateRequirementsCompliance(project.deliverables)
 score = score + (requirementsMet * 25 / 100)
 
 // Stakeholder Satisfaction
 satisfactionScore = SurveyStakeholders(project)
 score = score + (satisfactionScore * 25 / 100)
 
 IF score >= 70 THEN
 RETURN "PROJECT SUCCESS"
 ELSE IF score >= 50 THEN
 RETURN "PARTIAL SUCCESS"
 ELSE
 RETURN "PROJECT FAILED"
 ENDIF
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm calculates a weighted score based on cost, time, requirements compliance, and stakeholder satisfaction to determine overall project success.
